author: @sojournerdelaterra6144
text: That sterling engine has "remote camping generator" written all over it.

author: @sojournerdelaterra6144
text:
UK: You need to buy carbon credits to do that.
Robert: Oh yeah? Hold my coffee!

author: @ProlificInvention
text: Ive also found old fire extinguishers to be useful, I have used the large steel versions for my Internal Combustion Reactor experiments and some of the smaller ones cutup for metal melting crucibles.  Crazy how thick and good of grade steel is used on the large old ones, gave my friends plasma cutter a hard time.

replies.author: @TnTOmnibus
replies.text: nice one mate - i will look out for them
